heading: Public lands
label: 1507 Public lands
text: This chapter shall not in any manner be construed to authorize aliens to acquire title from the United States to any of the public lands of the United States or to in any manner affect or change the laws regulating the disposal of the public lands of the United States.
notes: CodificationAct , set out as , made sections 1501 to 1507 of this title applicable to the District of Columbia, on the basis of which certain provisions of this section were omitted.Feb. 23, 1905section 1508 of this titleSection was formerly classified to , Aliens and Nationality.section 77 of Title 8
